text:
7: Nature of Injury flag (only for ICD-9 codes)
1 = the code in positions 3-6 is a Nature of Injury ICD-9 code
0 = all other codes
RECORD_COND_1 (through RECORD_COND_20) NDI Record Axis Cause of Death - Condition 1 (through Condition 20) CHAR 5 These fields identify the underlying causes of death as edited and audited by the National Center for Health Statistics (NCHS). From 1999-2006 there were up to 8 codes, and from 2007 forward there are up to 20 codes. Positions 1-4: Condition Code
